stemHtml: According to Part-FCL, what does the term "rating" mean?

options.a: Measurement of the performance of a pilot, indicating the level achieved and documenting the skills that the pilot may exercise in accordance with the licence.
options.b: Classification according to a grade, based on a comparative assessment of quality, and entered on a licence.
options.c: Statement entered on a licence, setting forth privileges, special conditions or limitations pertaining thereto.
options.d: Designated operating privilege, based on specified conditions.
